data.body: C4 full non-integration suite: 4440 passed, 1 pre-existing UNRELATED failure (tests/e2e/test_editor_batch_library.py — bpmn-io workflow-editor harness; verified it fails IDENTICALLY on pristine origin/main with the same node harness, so NOT caused by this epic — zero file overlap with the reconciler/config/init changes). The teardown ERROR (test_mcp_output_schema_coverage HEAD-moved) was an artifact of committing C4 mid-run; re-ran it in isolation -> passes. Reconciler domain fully green (1130 tests). Closing C4.
